chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-723 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 Mr. Fida Hussain Channa, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sharyar Imdad Anwan, Assistant Advocate General along with Ghulam Qadir CMO Municipal Committee Khairpur /respondent No.3, Dr. Yar Muhammad Phulpoto, Chairman Municipal Committee Khairpur/ Respondent No.4..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Mr. Miran Bux Shar, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.3 and 4, which is taken on record. He also files statement/ compliance report, which is taken on record and copy thereof, has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. He has also submitted below detailed ten post dated cheques in favor of petitioner, which will be encashed within time. i. Cheque No. 52982207, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated 29.09.2025. ii. Cheque No. 52982208, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated 01.11.2025. iii. Cheque No. 52982209, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated 01.12.2025 iv. Cheque No. 52982210, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of January 2026. v. Cheque No. 52982211, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of February 2026. vi. Cheque No. 52982212, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of March 2026. vii. Cheque No. 52982213, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of April 2026. viii.

Cheque No. 52982212, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of March 2026. vii. Cheque No. 52982213, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of April 2026. viii. Cheque No. 52982214, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of May 2026. ix. Cheque No. 52982215, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.200,000/-(two lacs), dated, for the month of June 2026. x. Cheque No. 52982216, of Sindh Bank Limited Khairpur Branch, amounting to Rs.2,41,755/-(two lacs, forty one thousand, seven hundred fifty five), dated, for the month of July 2026. 2. The said cheques have been provided to the petitioner and counsel for the petitioner is present along with petitioner, he has also confirmed the contents and stated that total amount has been paid. Hence, in the circumstances, instant petition become infructuous same is hereby disposed of as infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
